MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER DOLAN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Appearances: Brian Murn of the Dolan Law Firm for defendant and moving party; Victor Gonzalez (510.860.7203) plaintiff and responding party appearing in propria persona. Discussed and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: sustained with leave to amend. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Reporter: Teanna Ward, CSR #11918
